summary: Completed comprehensive testing of House Sharing Seniors authentication features - Registration (approved applicants), Forgot Password, Reset Password, and Change Password flows. All 19 backend tests passed and all frontend UI flows verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test applications were created during testing and cleaned up. jane.doe.test@example.com / testpass123 remains as test user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested authentication features are working correctly. No mocked APIs - all APIs are real including Resend email service.
passed_tests: 1. Registration requires approved application - non-existent email correctly rejected with appropriate message
2. Login page has 'Forgot your password?' link that navigates to /forgot-password
3. Forgot Password page at /forgot-password - form submission shows success message
4. Reset Password page at /reset-password - shows invalid token message when no token, shows form when token provided
5. Admin login (admin@housesharingseniors.com.au / HSSadmin2024!) redirects to admin dashboard
6. Member Dashboard /dashboard has Settings tab with Change Password form
7. Change Password with wrong current password shows 'Current password is incorrect' error
8. Registration page shows info note about needing an approved application
Backend: API root endpoint
Backend: Admin login with correct credentials
Backend: Login rejects invalid credentials
Backend: Login rejects non-existent email
Backend: Registration without approved application fails with proper message
Backend: Registration validates email format
Backend: Existing user cannot register again
Backend: Forgot password for existing user succeeds
Backend: Forgot password prevents email enumeration
Backend: Forgot password validates email format
Backend: Reset password with invalid token fails
Backend: Reset password validates password length
Backend: Change password requires authentication
Backend: Change password rejects wrong current password
Backend: Change password validates new password length
Backend: Change password succeeds with correct credentials
Backend: Full registration flow (create application, approve, register)
Backend: /auth/me requires authentication
Backend: /auth/me returns correct user info with valid token
mocked_integrations: None - All APIs are real including Resend email service
